name: update_incident
description: Update an existing incident with a new status and/or message. Use this to post progress updates (e.g. moving from 'investigating' to 'identified'), communicate resolution steps, or resolve the incident. Each update creates a new entry in the incident's update timeline and can trigger subscriber notifications.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the status page.

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The ID of the incident to update.

parameters.name: incident.body
parameters.description: Status update message describing the current state or resolution.

parameters.name: incident.components
parameters.description: Object mapping component IDs to their updated status (e.g. {"cmp3c4d5e6f": "operational"}).

parameters.name: incident.deliver_notifications
parameters.description: Whether to send subscriber notifications for this update (default true).

incident.body: The database connection pool has been restored and all services are operating normally. Root cause was an expired TLS certificate on the connection pooler. We have implemented automated certificate renewal to prevent recurrence.

incident_updates.body: The database connection pool has been restored and all services are operating normally. Root cause was an expired TLS certificate on the connection pooler. We have implemented automated certificate renewal to prevent recurrence.
